_doc: style_mode Context (modulate handler), ARCANE mode (the DEFAULT target — research:character-arcane-stylization-2026-06-25 §5 fork 1). Same character node + same painterly effect node as style_mode_realistic.json; only these overrides differ. stylize_amount:1 pushes the FLAME identity coefficients along the proportion-exaggeration delta (eyes ↑/jaw ↓/cranium ↑/nose ↓, PCA-space, no remodeling), and effect_stack is the already-built RE painterly NPR pass (kuwahara → edge_darken → outline → posterize → paper_grain) — the Arcane painted read as evolvable DATA (EffectGenome / EffectStackCpu). Continuous: stylize_amount is a slider in [0,1] (fork 2), this config pins the full-arcane end.
